item.title: Flyposted event poster, 21st March
item.description:
Event poster has been pasted to the black electrical box near the Lennard Rd/Kent House Rd traffic lights.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The area 2-18 Penton place, 21st March
item.description:
I am writing to raise a serious and ongoing concern regarding persistent dog fouling in our area. Several neighbours have previously reported this issue to the council, yet the problem continues without any visible improvement. Dog waste is being left daily along the pedestrian walkway between house numbers 2–18 Penton Place, SE17 3JT and it is clear that this has become a long‑term and repeated issue. The continued failure of the dog owner to remove the waste is creating an unacceptable hygiene risk for residents, including children and elderly individuals who regularly use this walkway. Given the repeated nature of this problem and the lack of progress despite earlier reports from local residents, I request that the council take immediate and more robust enforcement action. This may include targeted monitoring of the area, issuing fixed penalty notices where appropriate, and ensuring that the responsible party is made fully aware of their legal obligations. To avoid neighbour disputes, I also ask that the council issue a general reminder or warning letter to all households in the area, reinforcing the requirement to clean up after dogs and the penalties for failing to do so. Yours faithfully, A concerned resident

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alberta Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Please remove the wheelie bin with someone’s rubbish in it off the pavement please so people don’t have to walk into the road and put themselves in danger

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Goodwin Road, Edmonton

item.title: Using wheelie bins to reserve parking space, 21st March
item.description:
167 & 169 constantly using wheelie bins to reserve parking spaces. They are reserving about 4 to 5 spaces for 2 cars. Parking is very busy down this road and for years they have been doing this and get confrontational when people move bins to park. This problem has been reported on numerous occasions and to date nothing has been done.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large suitcase flytipped, 21st March
item.description:
Big suitcase dumped near the street sign for Courtenay Rd, junction with Lennard Rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Courtenay Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole loose, 21st March
item.description:
The manhole at this location is loose and makes a bad noise when cars go over it. It can be heard at all times especially at night. We now have buses coming along this road which is making the problem worse
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brook Street, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking cars, 21st March
item.description:
Can't reverse car as rubbish now on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dayton Grove, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping & overloaded recycling bin, 21st March
item.description:
I reported this last Monday but it still hasn’t been removed. The recycling bin has not been emptied for at least two months due to contamination. Can this please be remedied so we are able to use the bin.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Streamway, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missed garden bin collection Crescent way, 21st March
item.description:
Missed garden bin collection Crescent Way

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Littering in comunal space, 21st March
item.description:
Someone keeps adding rubbish and random stuff in the communal area. It was cleaned once, but keeps happening. It has been going for months now.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): De Beauvoir Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tent and mattress abandoned in the park, 21st March
item.description:
This tent, mattress and other things have been there abandoned for months. They were in the bushes but today have been moved there. Can you please come and clean? There hasn’t been anyone living there for months. Families with children and dogs walk daily through the park and this creates a strong sense of unsanitary conditions. We don’t know what might be there, and children and dogs go near it, which could lead to accidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Allendale Close, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light outside of basil mansions was damaged by lorry about three months ago,council came and removed damaged lamppost and it has not been replaced,is very dark at night without street light, 21st March
item.description:
No street light
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Shafto Mews, Chelsea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Purple Bin, 21st March
item.description:
Has been dumped in the alleyway between sunland avenue and upton road close to the junction with upton road end

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upton Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christmas tree left on verge, 21st March
item.description:
The tree was left on the verge after Christmas, and never collected. It's rolled/blown down the slope and ended up outside my house. Sometimes it blows across the pavement or into the road. I reported this to the council a few weeks back (Ref 101002062251) but it has still not been cleared. On the verge outside no. 5.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Uplands Way, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet
